71971150.title: Crazy Times (album)

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: 2022 studio album by Sammy Hagar and the Circle

71971150.description: 2022 studio album by Sammy Hagar and the Circle
71971150.extract: Crazy Times is a 2022 studio album by hard rock supergroup Sammy Hagar and the Circle. The album follows 2021's covers album Lockdown 2020 and continues themes related to the confusion and historic nature of the COVID-19 pandemic, as well as critiques of corporate greed and reflections on aging.
